auth.subtitle: A Discord-like chat application
auth.name: Name
auth.googleLoginFailed: Google login failed. Make sure popups are allowed for this site, or try email/password login.
auth.googleSignupFailed: Google sign up failed. Make sure popups are allowed for this site, or try email/password sign up.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google OAuth is not configured. Please set VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in your .env.local file.
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your email and password and try again.
auth.sessionExpiredHint: Please sign in again to continue.
auth.connectionFailedHint: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
auth.setupFailedHint: Your account could not be set up. Try signing in again.
auth.createUsernameHint: Your username will be shown to other users.

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatarUrlHint: Paste an image URL (e.g. from imgur.com)

profile.uploadImageType: Please select an image file (PNG, JPEG, etc.)
profile.avatarTooLarge: Image too large. Try a smaller image.
profile.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Try again or paste a URL.

roles.noChannelRoles: No roles for this channel yet
roles.tipText: If you check "Administrator", all permissions will be automatically granted. You cannot select all permissions without Admin.
roles.cannotDeleteOwnAdmin: You cannot delete your own admin role
roles.cannotDeleteOtherAdmin: You cannot delete another user's admin role
roles.cannotRemoveOwnAdmin: You cannot remove your own admin role

users.alreadyMember: This user is already a member of the channel

messages.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation!

voice.micPermissionDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access to use voice chat.
voice.mustBeMember: You must be a channel member to join voice.
voice.joinFailed: Failed to join voice chat. Please try again.

errors.channelNameTooLong: Channel name must be 100 characters or less.
errors.displayNameTooLong: Name must be 32 characters or less.
errors.userNotReady: Please wait a moment for your account to be set up, then try again.
